description: Subtle outer-ring glow that breathes slowly without changing the frame silhouette.
notes: Use this as a restrained ambient layer. Avoid high alpha values; premium avatar frames should feel calm.

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Glow color. Prefer cool white, pale gold, or other low-saturation premium tones.

parameters.name: minAlpha
parameters.description: Lowest glow opacity in the loop.

parameters.name: maxAlpha
parameters.description: Highest glow opacity. Keep below 0.55 for a clean visual result.

parameters.name: scale
parameters.description: Small scale expansion applied at peak glow.
